pi_items.source: Web requests to both URLs. The claimed microsoft/ML-NET URL returns a 404 Not Found, while the correct dotnet/machinelearning URL returns HTTP 200 with a 25MB CSV file containing real NYC TLC taxi fare data.
The task description strictly mandates retaining Parallel.ForEach while switching to a ConcurrentDictionary and utilizing a lock statement for thread synchronization.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real, non-synthetic dataset (taxi-fare-train.csv) based on NYC TLC data. The metadata dataset_source claim of 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/microsoft/ML-NET/master/test/data/taxi-fare-train.csv' is incorrect and returns a 404 error; the correct working URL is under the dotnet/machinelearning repository. The task correctly lists Parallel.ForEach, ConcurrentDictionary, and lock as required programmatic constructs, matching the explicit requirements in the task description instructions.
